llm_wizard.install_instructions_ollama_macos:
To install Ollama on macOS:

1. Visit https://ollama.ai/download
2. Download the macOS installer
3. Run the installer and follow prompts
4. After installation, Ollama will start automatically

Or use Homebrew:
    brew install ollama
    ollama serve  # Start the server

Verify installation:
    ollama --version
llm_wizard.install_instructions_ollama_linux:
To install Ollama on Linux:

1. Run the installation script:
    curl -fsSL https://ollama.ai/install.sh | sh

2. Start the Ollama service:
    ollama serve

Verify installation:
    ollama --version
llm_wizard.install_instructions_ollama_windows:
To install Ollama on Windows:

1. Visit https://ollama.ai/download
2. Download the Windows installer
3. Run the installer and follow prompts
4. Ollama will start automatically

Verify installation:
    ollama --version
llm_wizard.install_instructions_llama_cpp:
To install llama-cpp-python:

1. Install via pip:
    pip install llama-cpp-python

For GPU acceleration (optional):

On macOS with Metal (M-series chips):
    CMAKE_ARGS="-DLLAMA_METAL=on" pip install llama-cpp-python

On Linux/Windows with CUDA:
    CMAKE_ARGS="-DLLAMA_CUBLAS=on" pip install llama-cpp-python

Verify installation:
    python -c "import llama_cpp; print(llama_cpp.__version__)"
